text: Planning a trip is often as exciting as the journey itself. I love researching destinations and imagining the new cultures I will discover. Once there, trying local food is a must; each meal tells a story about the place. Sometimes, language barriers create awkward but funny moments, like when I ordered a strange dish by accident. Despite the challenges, these experiences build lasting memories. I still smile thinking about a market I explored in Vietnam, where I communicated mostly with hand gestures. Travel teaches you that every mistake becomes a story, and every new culture adds a piece to your understanding of the world.
